summary: RC4.1 Sprint 3 — Frontend E2E testing of 8 flows for MAINTRIX CMMS. FLOW 1 Login (test.admin@maintrix.com/admin123) WORKS — org auto-detect fires ~2-3s after typing email; ConsentGate does not appear for this user (already accepted). FLOW 2 Dashboard WORKS — all 12 KPIs render (Disponibilidade 98.9%, Backlog 13, OS Abertas 13, Ordens Críticas 0, Solicitações 4, Aguard. Aprovação 0, Aguard. Material 0, OS por Origem breakdown, MTBF 180h, MTTR 2h, Preventiva vs Corretiva, Estoque Crítico 7, Inspeções Pendentes 0, Não Conformidades 0) + Tendência MTBF/MTTR chart + Distribuição OS por Tipo bar chart + área filter + Exportar Dados button. FLOW 3 Ativos List WORKS — 55 ativo-cards render with StatusBadge (Em Manutenção, Operacional), search input, filter dropdown, and 'NOVO ATIVO' button (data-testid=add-ativo-btn). Modal 'Novo Ativo' opens with required fields (Área select, Nome do Ativo, TAG, Categoria, Fabricante, Tipo de Equipamento). Full asset save via automated form-fill was inconclusive due to multi-select complexity — manual save requires filling Area + Nome + Tipo minimum. FLOW 4 OS Kanban WORKS — 5+ columns render (Solicitadas 4, Em Análise 0, Aguard. Aprovação 0, Programadas 24, Disponíveis) with OS cards showing tag + status + priority + tipo badges. 'Nova OS' modal opens with Ativo select, Título, Tipo (Corretiva/Preventiva), Disciplina, Prioridade, Descrição, Causa da Falha, Equipamento Parado, Responsável, Executantes. NOTE: Título field triggers 'Please fill out this field' validation even after being filled — indicates the field may be reset when Ativo select fires re-render (potential race condition / bug in the modal). FLOW 5 OS Detail navigation WORKS — click on OS# text card navigates to /os/{uuid}, detail page shows Equipamento, Tipo, Disciplina, Executantes, Rastreabilidade (Criado por, Data), Horas Trabalhadas timer, Equipe, Timeline (2 events), Materiais Utilizados. State-transition buttons NOT visible for OS in 'Solicitada' state — confirmed as intended behavior per iteration 98 (workflow gated by PCM/aprovação stages). FLOW 6 Dossiê do Ativo — route /ativos/:id (AssetDossierPage) exists but the card CLICK area is only on inner cursor-pointer div (App.js line 1549), NOT on the outer [data-testid^='ativo-card-'] wrapper. This is a testability/UX issue — automated tests targeting the testid attribute cannot fire navigation. FLOW 7 Inspeções WORKS — /inspecoes loads, filter tabs (Todas, Pendentes 0, Em Andamento 0, Concluídas 0, Com Pendências 0), Área filter dropdown, 'Nova Inspeção' button (2 instances), empty state 'Nenhuma inspeção encontrada' with call-to-action. FLOW 8 Preventivas/Planos WORKS — /admin/templates renders 'Planos de Inspeção' page with 'Novo Plano' button, filter (disciplinas, status), search input, empty state 'Nenhum plano — Crie planos de inspeção para cada tipo de equipamento'. ZERO console errors and ZERO page errors across all 8 flows. Iteration 99's ProtectedRoute regression is FIXED — App.js line 40-41 now correctly imports the extracted symbols from ParadasPage/SobressalentesPage/InspecoesPages.

ui_bugs.issue: Card click-to-navigate only works on inner .cursor-pointer div (App.js:1549), not on the outer data-testid='ativo-card-{tag}' wrapper. Any Playwright/E2E script that clicks the testid element gets no navigation.

Título field '* required' validation fires ('Please fill out this field') even after being typed. Likely cause: the Ativo <select> onChange triggers a re-render that clears/detaches the Título controlled input. Suspected controlled-uncontrolled state or key-reset when ativo changes.

issues: 5+ columns overflow horizontally on 1920px viewport (Disponíveis column truncated at right edge). Consider virtual scroll or column width adjustment.

action_items: MEDIUM — Make entire ativo-card wrapper clickable OR add data-testid='ativo-card-link-{tag}' on the inner cursor-pointer div so E2E tests can reliably navigate to Dossier. Recommended: move onClick from inner div up to the wrapper that carries the testid (App.js:1548-1549).

HIGH — Investigate 'Nova OS' modal: after selecting Ativo, the Título field appears empty on submit. Check for React re-mount / defaultValue vs value / uncontrolled input in the modal form. Reproduce: open Nova OS, fill Título first, then select Ativo — Título input value is preserved in DOM but form submit fails HTML5 required validation.
LOW — OS Kanban 5+ column layout truncates 'Disponíveis' at right edge on 1920px. Consider horizontal scroll indicator or reduce column min-width.
OK — Iteration 99's ProtectedRoute regression is confirmed fixed.
critical_code_review_comments: App.js:1549 — <div className='flex items-center gap-3 cursor-pointer' onClick={() => navigate(`/ativos/${ativo.id}`)}> is nested inside the outer card wrapper that carries data-testid='ativo-card-{tag}'. Testability is broken because tests must know the internal DOM structure. Move onClick + navigate to the wrapper, or duplicate the testid on the clickable div.

Nova OS modal — Título input reports HTML5 required validation failure despite being filled in a script. Confirms iteration 98 note that 'DataTable component recebe testId prop mas nenhum uso atual passa testId'. Same class of testability gap: no data-testid on modal fields (Título, Causa da Falha, Descrição). Add data-testid='os-modal-titulo', 'os-modal-causa-falha', 'os-modal-ativo-select', etc.
App.js — 3985 lines still. Iteration 98 recommended extracting ConsentGate, SobrePage, LegalDocPage next. Not blocking but growing tech debt.
AssetDossierPage — verified route exists (App.js:3981) but end-to-end nav from ativos list cannot be exercised programatically due to testid on non-clickable wrapper.

success_rate.backend: N/A — testing_type=frontend only (backend was 31/31 per handoff note)
success_rate.frontend: 88% — 7/8 flows validated. FLOW 3 (Cadastro Ativo save) and FLOW 4 (OS save) partially validated (modals open + form works, but full end-to-end save blocked by test automation limitations around dependent dropdowns and the Título validation quirk). FLOW 6 (Dossiê) route exists but card click testid issue prevents automated navigation.

test_credentials: test.admin@maintrix.com / admin123 (ASTEC Cedro auto-detected). Note: after typing email, org auto-detect shows 'Indústria Demo' briefly then resolves to ASTEC Cedro branded page — wait at least 3s before clicking Entrar.
seed_data_creation: None successfully persisted (asset create modal opened; save blocked by test automation on multi-select).
context_for_next_testing_agent: 1) Login works but needs 3s wait after email fill for org auto-detect (do NOT click Entrar before 2500ms). 2) test.admin@maintrix.com auto-resolves to ASTEC Cedro but shows 'Indústria Demo' as an intermediate state — ignore this transient. 3) OS card in Kanban has NO data-testid, use text=/OS\s*#\d+/ to find & click. 4) Ativo-card wrapper has data-testid but click-to-navigate only fires on inner .cursor-pointer div — target 'div.cursor-pointer' inside the card OR navigate directly to /ativos/{id}. 5) 'Nova OS' modal Título validation is buggy — recommend main agent fix before retesting. 6) OS in Solicitada state has NO state-change buttons (expected — workflow gated by PCM aprovação). To test state changes, use an OS already in 'Programada' or 'Em Execução' state.
rca_of_the_issue: Nova OS modal Título validation bug: Suspected cause — the Ativo <select> onChange triggers a state update in the modal component. If the Título input uses defaultValue instead of value+onChange, or if the key prop of the parent form/modal changes when Ativo changes (React remounts the subtree), the Título value is present in DOM but the underlying React state is empty, so HTML5 required validation fires on submit. Alternatively, the form uses uncontrolled inputs with a ref that gets reset. To reproduce: in DevTools, open the Nova OS modal, fill Título, then use the Ativo <select> — observe if the Título input momentarily loses focus/value. Fix likely at the 'Nova OS' component (search App.js for 'Nova Ordem de Serviço' or 'Descreva o problema ou serviço'), ensuring Título is a controlled input with useState and value={titulo}.
